build.beforeDevCommand: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "Set-Location -LiteralPath $env:PARADOX_REPO_ROOT; npm run dev --prefix web"
build.beforeBuildCommand: powershell -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "Set-Location -LiteralPath $env:PARADOX_REPO_ROOT; npm run build --prefix web"

security.csp: default-src 'self' http://127.0.0.1:8765 http://localhost:8765; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' 'unsafe-eval'; connect-src 'self' http://127.0.0.1:8765 http://localhost:8765; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; font-src 'self' data: https://fonts.gstatic.com; img-src 'self' data: http://127.0.0.1:8765 http://localhost:8765 blob:; frame-src 'self' http://127.0.0.1:8765 http://localhost:8765 blob: data:
